hero.subtitle_rest: and neuroscience backed tools to overcome pornography addiction. Privately, on your phone.

features.dhikr_desc: 17 categories with Arabic, transliteration, translation, and hadith sources.
features.blocker_desc: Blocks haram content across all browsers and apps. Strictness levels, schedules, and SafeSearch.
features.analytics_desc: Patterns, vulnerable times, weekly scores, five-level mood check-ins.
features.salah_desc: Prayer tracking and workout logging tied to recovery scoring.

organizations.label: For MSAs & Youth Groups
organizations.title: Your members are struggling in silence. Give them a way out.
organizations.body: Purchase invite codes for your community. Register trusted mentors. Members get anonymous, one-on-one access to guidance — without ever revealing who they are.
organizations.chat_msg1: I keep falling back. I don't know who to talk to about this.
organizations.chat_msg2: You're not alone in this. That's exactly why we're here. Let's work through it together.
organizations.chat_msg3: You really can't see who I am?
organizations.chat_msg4: I see "Mentee 7". That's it. This is completely anonymous.
organizations.step1_body: Buy a batch of invite codes for your community. Set how many can be redeemed and when they expire.
organizations.step2_body: Give mentor codes to trusted people — imams, counselors, older students. They create a visible profile so mentees know who they're speaking to.
organizations.step3_body: Share mentee codes at halaqas, group chats, or on a flyer. Members join anonymously with one tap.
organizations.step4_body: Mentees message mentors one-on-one. They show up only as "Mentee 1", "Mentee 2". Real identities are never exposed. Full app access at no cost.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: We're here to help.
support.contact_body: For any questions, issues, or feedback, reach out to us at ihsanappios@gmail.com. We aim to respond within 48 hours.
support.manage_body: Subscriptions are managed through the App Store. To cancel or change your plan:
support.manage_item2: Tap your name at the top
support.manage_item4: Select Ihsan and choose your option
support.delete_body: All personal data is stored locally on your device. To delete it, simply uninstall the Ihsan app. To request deletion of server-side data (community posts and anonymous analytics), contact us at ihsanappios@gmail.com.
support.crisis_body: Ihsan is not a substitute for professional help. If you are experiencing a mental health crisis, please call your local emergency services.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Ihsan ("we", "our", "the app") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle your information when you use our mobile application.
privacy.info_body: Ihsan stores the following information locally on your device only:
privacy.info_item1: Your recovery streak and progress data
privacy.storage_body: All your personal data is stored exclusively on your device using local storage. We do not transmit, upload, or store your data on any external servers. Your recovery journey, journal entries, and personal information never leave your device. If you delete the app, all data is permanently removed.
privacy.sharing_body: We do not sell, trade, rent, or share your personal information with any third parties. Since all data remains on your device, there is no data to share.
privacy.analytics_body: Ihsan does not use any third-party analytics, tracking, or advertising services. We do not collect usage statistics, behavioral data, or device identifiers.
privacy.subscription_body: Subscription purchases are processed entirely through Apple's App Store. We do not have access to your payment information, credit card details, or Apple ID. All billing is managed by Apple according to their privacy policy.
privacy.changes_body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be reflected in the app with an updated revision date.
privacy.contact_body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at ihsanappios@gmail.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of the Ihsan mobile application. By using Ihsan, you agree to these Terms.
terms.acceptance_body: By downloading, installing, or using Ihsan, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the app.
terms.description_body: Ihsan is a self-improvement and recovery support application that provides tools including streak tracking, crisis intervention techniques, educational content, journaling, workout tracking, and Islamic spiritual guidance. Ihsan is not a medical or therapeutic service and does not replace professional help.
terms.billing_body: Ihsan offers a premium subscription with the following terms:
terms.billing_item1: Payment is charged to your Apple ID account at confirmation of purchase.
terms.billing_item2: Subscription automatically renews unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current billing period.
terms.billing_item3: Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period at the subscription rate.
terms.billing_item4: You can manage and cancel subscriptions in your Apple ID account settings.
terms.health_body: Ihsan is a self-help support tool and is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. If you are experiencing a mental health crisis, please contact a qualified healthcare provider or emergency services. The breathing exercises, grounding techniques, and other tools provided are for general wellness support only.
terms.liability_body: Ihsan is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any damages arising from your use of the app. Your use of Ihsan is at your own risk. In no event shall our total liability to you exceed the amount you have actually paid to us in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim.
terms.ip_body: All content within Ihsan, including text, graphics, and design, is the property of Ihsan or its content suppliers. Quranic verses, hadith, and Islamic scholarly quotes are attributed to their original sources and are used for educational purposes.
terms.termination_body: We reserve the right to terminate or suspend access to Ihsan at any time, without notice, for conduct that we believe violates these Terms or is harmful to other users or the app.
terms.changes_body: We may revise these Terms at any time. Continued use of Ihsan after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.
terms.language_body: These Terms of Service may be translated for convenience. In the event of any conflict or inconsistency between the English version and any translation, the English version shall prevail.
terms.contact_body: If you have questions about these Terms, please contact us at ihsanappios@gmail.com.
